type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The substance selenium was not included in the 2014 NPRI Report to Environment Canada. This occurred due to changes in laboratory minimum detection limits (MDLs) for these substances in site tailings samples. Historically, MDLs were higher for these substances and sample results were all below detection limits. With the change in laboratories and lowered detection limits, concentrations of these substances in tailings can now be quantified and reported. The 2014 report has been updated to include the 2014 emissions of selenium and all reports from 2015 moving forward will include emissions of this substance.
